description: Warehouse locations. Name column is warehouse_name, not name.

chunks.text:
TABLE: warehouses

DESCRIPTION: Warehouse locations. Name column is warehouse_name, not name.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: warehouses, fulfillment centers, storage locations, distribution centers, depots

PRIMARY_KEY: warehouse_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, address, city, state, zip_code, country, phone, email, capacity_sqft, manager_name, operating_since

USE_CASES: Warehouse capacity, inventory by warehouse, fulfillment location analysis
